title: GrimoireRitual
description: Schema for ritual YAML files in corpus/rituals/. Rituals are symbolic/defensive analogues — no actionable exploit instructions permitted.

defensive_focus.description: REQUIRED true: confirms this ritual entry is framed defensively with no actionable exploit instructions

archetype.description: Exploit/defense archetype this ritual maps to (e.g. reentrancy-serpent, oracle-manipulation)

blockchain_event_pattern.description: The on-chain event pattern this ritual symbolically corresponds to (defensive framing)

defense_paradigm.description: The defensive paradigm from the Atlantean-Vault framework

participants.description: Entity IDs involved in this ritual
